common.footer_legal: Ultimate Tracker · Albion Online Node Tracker · Not affiliated with Sandbox Interactive

landing.hero_p: Add the bot to your Discord server, configure your guild, and get a collaborative node map with precise timers.
landing.commands_subtitle: All via slash commands — no prefixes, no complex setup.
landing.feature_0_desc: Visualize active server nodes in real time with color-coded markers by resource type.
landing.feature_1_desc: Precise countdowns for each node spawn, with time and resource type filters.
landing.feature_2_desc: Report nodes directly from Discord with /scout — the bot instantly shows them on your guild's map.
landing.feature_3_desc: Each guild has its own private tracker. Only members with the configured role have access.
landing.cmd_0_desc: Registers the server and configures the tracking channel.
landing.cmd_1_desc: Sets the role that can view and report nodes.
landing.cmd_2_desc: Reports a node: zone, objective, and duration.
landing.cmd_3_desc: Sends the link to your guild's map in chat.

login.title: Ultimate Tracker
login.subtitle: Sign in with Discord to access your guild's tracking map.
login.error_no_guild: You are not a member of any guild registered in this tracker.
login.footer_note: Only members with the role configured by the guild admin will have access.

dashboard.title: Your Servers
dashboard.subtitle: Choose a server to open the tracking map.
dashboard.empty: No servers found. Ask your admin to register the server with /setup.
dashboard.server_config_desc: Select your Albion Online server region.

donation.subtitle: Ultimate Tracker is free for all guilds. If you enjoy the project, consider donating to help cover server costs.
donation.card_desc: Your donation helps keep the servers online, fund new features, and ensure the tracker stays free for the entire community.
donation.benefit_2: Guarantees free access for all guilds
donation.secure_note: Secure payment via PayPal · Any amount helps!
donation.footer_note: Contributions do not guarantee any exclusive benefits. Ultimate Tracker remains free for everyone.

map.scouts_active: {count, plural, one {# active scout} other {# active scouts}}
map.empty_nodes: No nodes. Use the + button to scout.
map.empty_filter: No results for the current filters.
map.empty_routes: No routes. Use the + button to report.

admin.page_subtitle: Manage plans, keys, and administrators of Ultimate Tracker.
admin.zones_instruction: Select a zone and click on the map to save the center.

modal.route_subtitle: Mix 🌍 world zones and Avalonian zones (TNL) in any order
